text.message: u crying now? and when u robbed me while i was weakest it was ok?
stealing from the one with lowest points
Blue is on 4 with all resources
the whole board to his own
did u stole from blue when he was leading?
or did u stole from me?
why u didnt do the things u are preaching?
Tired of being stolen 10/10 times when im no where near the lead
im tired of being robbed when i was weakest
i guess u learned ur lesson
red has just been gifting the win to you blue contrats
why you stole again from me when blue is leading?
Opinions change so much it makes me laugh
